title: AuthUserIdentity
description: Canonical user identity shape returned by all auth endpoints (login, token-refresh, SSO callback, register). Pins the minimum required fields (id, email) while permitting the additional claims that richer surfaces (GET /auth/me, device-flow) carry. Patterned after the device_token_success_schema.json user sub-object which is the reference implementation.

email_verified.description: Whether the user has verified their email address.

onboarding_completed.description: Whether the user has completed the in-product onboarding flow.
